en: I'm too hot Call the police and the fireman
ko: 나 너무 핫해, 경찰이랑 소방관을 불러.

en: I'm too hot Make a dragon wanna retire, man
ko: 나 너무 핫해, 용도 은퇴하고 싶게 만들어.

en: I'm too hot Say my name, you know who I am
ko: 야, 나 너무 핫해, 내 이름을 말해봐. 내가 누군지 알잖아.

en: I'm too hot And my band bought out that money Break it down
ko: 나 너무 핫해, 내 밴드가 그 돈을 다 가져갔어. 브레이크 다운.

en: Girls hit your hallelujah Girls hit your hallelujah
ko: 여자들아 할렐루야를 외쳐, 여자들아 할렐루야를 외쳐.

en: Girls hit your hallelujah Cause uptown funk gon' give it to ya
ko: 여자들아 할렐루야를 외쳐, 업타운 펑크가 보여줄 테니까.

en: Cause uptown funk gon' give it to ya Cause uptown funk gon' give it to ya
Saturday night and we in the spot Don't believe me, just watch
Don't believe me, just watch Don't believe me, just watch
Don't believe me, just watch Don't believe me, just watch
